hero.principal: Machines that transform quality into every stitch.
hero.subtitle: Real-time IoT monitoring, predictive maintenance, and AI insights — built for modern textile factories.

cta-top.title: Transform your textile industry with DyeTex
cta-top.text: Monitor, anticipate, and respond before a failure occurs. Digitize your plant today.

firstSection.title: Why choose us?
firstSection.text: At DyeTex, we are committed to providing innovative, high-quality solutions for the textile industry. Our products are designed to improve the efficiency and quality of your production.
firstSection.cards-first: Monitor machine performance in real time
firstSection.cards-fourth: Identify potential failures and receive notifications

secondSection.title: How does it work?
secondSection.text: Our system is designed to be easy to use and integrate into your existing processes. Monitor machine performance in real time, receive alerts about potential failures, and generate detailed reports on production efficiency.

how-steps.step1: Connect IoT sensors to your machines
how-steps.step3: Receive AI alerts before failures occur

about-the-team.title: Meet the team behind DyeTex
about-the-team.text: A multidisciplinary team dedicated to transforming the textile industry through smart solutions.

mission.title: Mission:
mission.text: Provide textile companies with an efficient solution that optimizes machine performance through real-time monitoring, increasing productivity and reducing downtime through timely maintenance notifications.

vision.title: Vision:
vision.text: Become the leading platform for the textile textile industry, offering a solution that transforms the management of machinery and the production process.

appSection.purpose: DyeTex drives operational efficiency in the textile industry through advanced technology.
appSection.question-msg: Looking to reduce downtime, cut costs, and boost machine efficiency?
appSection.answ-msg: you get real-time monitoring, smart alerts, and detailed reports to take your operations to the next level.
appSection.motivate-msg: Try it today and turn your factory into a smart facility

pricing.free-desc: Ideal to test the unified monitoring experience

subscribe.title: Stay ahead of the industry
subscribe.subtitle: Subscribe to receive product updates, industry insights, and early access to new features.
